source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A spherical shell with total mass \( M \) and charge \( Q \) rotates about the \( z \)-axis with angular speed \( \omega \), and its gyromagnetic ratio is \( \gamma = g\left(\frac{Q}{2M}\right) \). Determine the gyromagnetic ratio \( \gamma \).

image_dependency: question_text does not explicitly reference a diagram, figure labels, or visual attributes, so image reliance is supported by metadata more than by wording
multi_step: question asks for a single symbolic result
multiple-choice options are provided (4 choices), which can reduce reasoning burden
question_text is concept-based but does not clearly require chaining several independent conditions or calculations
verifiability: choices are provided and answer_text matches one option exactly (Q/2M)

decision_reasons: question, answer, and primary image are all present, so the core semantic assets are intact
asset registry passed with no recorded issues
verifiability is high because the answer is present and matches one of the provided choices exactly
the only noted risk is that image dependence is not fully clear from the text alone, but this does not prevent recovery because the image asset is available
